settings.heading: The helpful stuff. From parents who've been there.
settings.body_text: Short videos, bedtime stories, play guides, and honest notes from the middle of it. No pretending it's easy.
settings.feature_title: The 15-minute gear wall reset (when they're losing it)
settings.feature_sub: It's 4:47pm, dinner isn't started, and everyone is unraveling. Here's the reset Maya uses — honestly, imperfectly.
